title: Selective xml export, export branches of the fastructure separately
author: agostonl119
body_snippet: If it is possible to ask for the possibility to selectively export only certain branches of the fastructure...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Triage refresh (P4 version-label debt): this issue is tagged with legacy version labels. Please retest on the latest build (fork v1.79.x or upstream dev), then share reproducible steps and expected vs actual behavior. If still valid, keep open and relabel to current triage scope (for example Need 2 check). If fixed, close with resolution.

Current legacy version labels: 1.78.*

notes:
AI triage (claude): Valid feature request to export a subtree/branch of the connections tree to XML, useful for sharing partial configs without exposing the full tree.
Approach: Add context menu option on tree node to export selected branch; pass selected ContainerInfo as root to existing XML serializer instead of full tree root.
